sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ الطُّلَّابُ إِلَى المَلْعَبِ فِي حِصَّةِ التَّرْبِيَةِ البَدَنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su otišli na teren na čas tjelesnog odgoja.
sentences.translationEn: The students went to the field during physical education class.

sentences.translation: Igrali su fudbal i jako se zabavljali.
sentences.translationEn: They played football and had a great time.

sentences.arabic: سَجَّلَ فَرِيقُ أَحْمَدَ هَدَفَيْنِ فِي المَبَارَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmedov tim je postigao dva gola na utakmici.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed's team scored two goals in the match.

sentences.arabic: انْتَهَتِ المَبَارَاةُ وَعَادَ الجَمِيعُ إِلَى الفَصْلِ.
sentences.translation: Utakmica je završila i svi su se vratili u razred.
sentences.translationEn: The match ended and everyone returned to class.

sentences.translation: Učenici su bili umorni, ali sretni.
sentences.translationEn: The students were tired but happy.
